ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tax_records" (
  "rec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "age_group" INTEGER /* Age group of the taxpayer */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the tax record */,
  "gross_total_income" REAL /* Gross total income of the taxpayer */,
  "total_taxable_income" REAL /* Total taxable income after deductions */,
  "deductions" REAL /* Total deductions claimed */,
  "net_rent" REAL /* Net rental income */,
  "net_salary" REAL /* Net salary income */,
  "other_income" REAL /* Other income sources */,
  "personal_income_tax" REAL /* Personal income tax liability */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight factor representing the population proportion */,
  "filing_status" TEXT /* Filing status of the taxpayer */,
  "number_of_dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents claimed by the taxpayer */,
  "state_of_residence" TEXT /* State of residence of the taxpayer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_records_deductions FOREIGN KEY ("deductions") REFERENCES tax_deductions ("deduction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_records_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES tax_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_records_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_records_other_income FOREIGN KEY ("other_income") REFERENCES income_sources ("income_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which tax records are available */,
  "tax_filing_deadline" TEXT /* Tax filing deadline for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_deductions" (
  "deduction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of deduction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deduction */,
  "deduction_type" TEXT /* Type of deduction (standard or itemized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deduction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_sources" (
  "income_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income source */,
  "income_type" TEXT /* Type of income (active or passive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the tax rate is applicable */,
  "income_bracket" REAL /* Income bracket for the tax rate */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate percentage */,
  "tax_bracket_type" TEXT /* Type of tax bracket (federal or state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES tax_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_payers" (
  "tax_payer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax payer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tax payer */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the tax payer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the tax payer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the tax payer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_payer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_payers_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_consultants" (
  "consultant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax consultant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tax consultant */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the tax consultant */,
  "credentials" TEXT /* Credentials of the tax consultant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consultant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consultant_clients" (
  "consultant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax consultant */,
  "tax_payer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax payer who is a client of the consultant */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consultant_id", "tax_payer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax analysis */,
  "tax_payer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax payer for the analysis */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the analysis */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the tax analysis */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_analysis_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES tax_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_analysis_tax_payer_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_payer_id") REFERENCES tax_payers ("tax_payer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax simulation */,
  "tax_payer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax payer for the simulation */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the simulation */,
  "scenario_description" TEXT /* Description of the tax scenario simulated */,
  "simulation_result" TEXT /* Result of the tax simulation */,
  "outcome_analysis" TEXT /* Analysis of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_simulations_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES tax_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_simulations_tax_payer_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_payer_id") REFERENCES tax_payers ("tax_payer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "rec_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax record accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date of last access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES tax_consultants ("consultant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_rec_id FOREIGN KEY ("rec_id") REFERENCES tax_records ("rec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax authority */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tax authority */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction of the tax authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax regulation */,
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax authority issuing the regulation */,
  "regulation_text" TEXT /* Text of the tax regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the regulation becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_regulations_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("authority_id") REFERENCES tax_authorities ("authority_id")
)
